campaigns.style_prompt: upbeat electronic dance pop with soaring synth chords and a driving rhythm. Features a powerful female soprano belting an emotional chorus with vibrato and doubled harmonies. Warm bright energy, made to make people dance and feel euphoric.
campaigns.description: Lancement — David Guetta x Ariana Grande Vibes

campaigns.style_prompt: emotional electronic pop ballad that builds into a massive uplifting drop. Warm piano intro, lush string pads, then soaring synth lead. Powerful female voice with emotional vibrato and big harmonies. Euphoric and catchy, radio-ready dance pop.
campaigns.description: Semaine Ballade Electro — Piano Drop Guetta Style

campaigns.style_prompt: high-energy electronic dance pop with punchy driving beat, bright catchy synth melody, and a powerful female voice delivering a hooky sing-along chorus. Upbeat, bold, commercial pop energy. Summer dancefloor feeling.
campaigns.description: Semaine Summer Dancefloor — Ariana x Jazzy

campaigns.style_prompt: dark yet emotional electronic pop with deep warm bass, cinematic build-up, and a soaring female soprano cutting through with passion. Tension then release into a euphoric chorus. Sophisticated club-ready sound.
campaigns.description: Semaine Dark Emotional — Future Pop Guetta MORTEN

campaigns.style_prompt: uplifting feel-good electronic pop with tropical warm synths, bright catchy female vocals full of energy and positivity. Playful melody, bouncy beat, summer anthem energy. Radio-friendly and infectious.
campaigns.description: Semaine Tropical Pop — Jazzy Flavour Summer Hit

campaigns.style_prompt: powerful emotional pop dance anthem with sweeping orchestral synths, dramatic build-up and a massive chorus drop. Soprano female voice with huge range and passionate delivery. Epic and cinematic stadium feel.
campaigns.description: Semaine Stadium Anthem — Epic Chorus Ariana Style

campaigns.style_prompt: groovy electronic pop with funky bass line, warm synth chords, and a smooth catchy female voice blending pop and soul. Upbeat summer groove, feel-good energy, dancefloor ready with a hooky memorable chorus.
campaigns.description: Semaine Groove Electro — Soul Pop Jazzy Vibes

campaigns.style_prompt: euphoric electronic dance pop with bright plucked synths, driving energetic beat, and soaring female vocals building to an emotional sing-along chorus. Uplifting, warm, sun-soaked summer energy. Made to move crowds.
campaigns.description: Mi-Ete — Euphoric Festival Pop Guetta x Jazzy

campaigns.style_prompt: intimate yet powerful electronic pop with soft warm intro building into a bold emotional chorus. Female voice starts delicate and blossoms into full passionate belting. Emotional vulnerability meets dance energy.
campaigns.description: Fin Juillet — Intimate Pop Power Ariana Style

campaigns.style_prompt: catchy electronic pop dance with a bold hooky chorus, punchy synth lead, and a charismatic female vocalist with attitude and sass. Fun, youthful, bright energy. Chart-ready commercial pop with a modern electronic edge.
campaigns.description: Debut Aout — Bold Commercial Pop Dance

campaigns.style_prompt: nostalgic yet modern electronic pop with warm retro synths, emotional melancholy mixed with euphoric chorus. Female vocals convey longing and strength simultaneously. Late summer feeling, bittersweet and beautiful.
campaigns.description: Fin Ete — Nostalgic Bittersweet Pop Electro
